verdicts.reason: Correct fcc cubic Cu, *(2,2,2) repeat, prints cell and atom count.
Pt(111) 4-layer, CO ontop, vacuum 10; len=18 correct.
mx2 MoS2 monolayer, add_vacuum 10, prints cell correctly.
H2O EMT, BFGS, prints energy before and after.
Langevin 100 steps, 5 fs, 300 K; prints temps and energies.
VelocityVerlet 50 steps, MB 300 K, prints initial/final total energy.
N2 EMT optimize then Vibrations, prints frequencies.
Writes/reads POSCAR vasp, prints atom count and cell params.
Octahedron Cu length=5, prints atom count and positions shape.
Al bcc a=3.3 cubic, prints cell and formula correctly.
Si diamond, repeat 3x3x3, prints atom count and volume.
NaCl spacegroup 225 cellpar 5.64, correct basis; prints atoms/symbols.
fcc100 Cu size (3,3,3) vacuum 12, prints atoms and cell.
bcc110 Fe size (2,2,4) vacuum 10, prints atoms and cell.
surface (2,1,1) Cu 3 layers, add_vacuum 10, prints atoms/cell.
CH4 from G2, prints positions, C-H bond lengths, formula.
nanotube (6,6) length=4, prints atoms and cell.
Icosahedron Au noshells=3, prints atoms and center of mass.
fcc111 Al bridge N2 height 2.0 vacuum 10, prints atoms/species.
OH on Pt(111) three sites, EMT single-point, picks lowest.
run() returns bool not step count; prints 'True steps' instead of number.
FrechetCellFilter+BFGS, prints cell and energy before/after.
PreconLBFGS Ni with cell filter, get_number_of_steps, prints results.
VelocityVerlet Pd 2x2x2 500 K 2 fs 200 steps, prints energy diff.
CH4 optimize+Vibrations, filters and prints real frequencies.
Single-atom Cu bulk yields near-zero/imaginary modes; HarmonicThermo likely errors.
Au bulk to xyz, read back, prints symbols and positions.
ASE db stores Cu/Ag/Au EMT, select prints formula and energy.
tag<2 fixes only top layer; bottom 2 layers are tags 3,4.
